import sqlite3


def process_user_uploads(user_ids: list):
    conn = sqlite3.connect("data.db")
    placeholders = ",".join("?" * len(user_ids))
    cursor = conn.execute(
        f"SELECT * FROM uploads WHERE user_id IN ({placeholders})",
        user_ids,
    )
    uploads = cursor.fetchall()
    conn.executemany(
        "UPDATE uploads SET processed = 1 WHERE id = ?",
        [(upload[0],) for upload in uploads],
    )
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()


def sync_external_data(record_ids: list):
    response = requests.post(
        "https://api.example.com/items/batch",
        json={"ids": record_ids},
    )
    data = response.json()
    save_to_cache_batch(record_ids, data)


def generate_reports(users: list):
    pdf_data = [(user.id, create_pdf_report(user)) for user in users]
    with sqlite3.connect("data.db") as conn:
        conn.executemany(
            "INSERT INTO reports (user_id, pdf_data) VALUES (?, ?)",
            pdf_data,
        )
